name: Brow Lamination, Tint & Waxing
description: Tinting is dyeing your eyebrows to make them darker and fuller. Waxing is Removing unwanted eyebrow hairs with hot wax to shape your brows. Lamination A treatment that lifts and shapes your eyebrow hairs to make them look fuller. Full treament can help the shape of eyebrow can last 3-6 weeks, making your brows look darker and more uniform.

name: Lashes Lift & Tin
description:
A Lash Lift & Tint is the perfect low-maintenance beauty treatment for naturally beautiful, eye-opening lashes — no extensions needed!
A lash lift is like a perm for your natural lashes. It gently curls and lifts them upward from the root, making them appear longer, fuller, and more defined — without needing a lash curler or mascara.
A lash tint adds rich, dark color to your natural lashes, similar to mascara, but long-lasting and smudge-proof. Great for lighter or fine lashes that need a little extra pop!
